channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Raising Awareness About Self-Harm During March
item.description: March is designated as Self-Harm Awareness Month in Canada, aiming to reduce stigma and promote open discussion about self-harm and related mental health challenges. While attitudes toward mental heal...

item.title: Several Nigerians Injured After Iran’s Missile Attacks On The UAE
item.description: Over the weekend, Iran fired several ballistic missiles and drones toward the United Arab Emirates (UAE), leaving at least six people dead and more than 140 injured, including many foreign workers suc...

item.title: Tanzania plans digital ticketing for commuter buses to modernize transport
item.description: Dar es Salaam — The Land Transport Regulatory Authority (Latra) in Tanzania is planning to introduce electronic ticketing for daladala buses to improve fare collection and modernize urban transport. R...

item.title: Tensions Rise as US and Iran Clash over Gulf Security
item.description: Tensions in the Middle East have sharply escalated as the United States calls on other nations to support its military operations against Iran. US President Donald Trump urged allies, including China,...

item.title: Several civilians injured in ongoing missile attacks by Iran and Hezbollah on Israel
item.description: Since the early hours of Sunday, Israel has been under repeated missile attacks from Iran and its Lebanese ally, Hezbollah, resulting in injuries and property damage across multiple regions. According...

item.title: Ashay Sewlall leaves Big Brother Mzansi after strong performance
item.description: Ashay Sewlall, also known as 'Paprika', was unexpectedly evicted from Big Brother Mzansi during Sunday night’s live show, marking a dramatic turn in the Bazozwa-themed season. At 24, the Richards Bay ...

item.title: Trump criticizes NATO for lack of support after uncoordinated strikes on Iran
item.description: Former President Donald Trump has criticized NATO after launching military strikes on Iran without prior consultation with the alliance. In a statement, he warned that NATO could face a 'very bad futu...

item.title: Implementation challenges for Ruto-Sakaja Sh80bn Nairobi infrastructure pact
item.description: President William Ruto and Nairobi Governor Johnson Sakaja recently signed a Sh80 billion cooperation agreement aimed at addressing Nairobi’s long-standing infrastructure problems, particularly in dra...

item.title: Sanwo-Olu Pays Tribute to Lagos Mothers on Mother’s Day
item.description: Governor Babajide Sanwo-Olu don take time to celebrate all mothers for their hard work and sacrifices as Mother’s Day waka come. For him official 𝕏 account, e talk say mothers dey very important not ...

item.title: Barcelona Beat Sevilla 5-2 With Raphinha Scoring Three Goals

item.title: US seeks international coalition to secure shipping in Strait of Hormuz amid Middle East tensions
item.description: The US administration under President Donald Trump is reportedly planning to announce a coalition of countries to escort ships through the strategically important Strait of Hormuz. Trump emphasized th...

item.title: Election Commission Announces Bypoll Schedule for Eight Assembly Constituencies in April
item.description: The Election Commission of India (ECI) has announced that by-elections for eight assembly constituencies across six states will be held in April 2026. The Chief Election Commissioner (CEC), Gyanesh Ku...

item.title: Two deaths and several cases reported in meningitis outbreak in Kent
item.description: Two individuals have died following an outbreak of meningitis in the Canterbury area of Kent, according to the UK Health Security Agency (UKHSA). Eleven more people have shown symptoms of meningitis a...

item.title: Practical Strategies for Enjoyable Family Mealtimes
item.description: Sharing meals as a family, even just a few nights a week, helps establish healthy eating habits, encourages positive social interaction, and supports emotional development in children. Preschool-aged ...

item.title: Exploring Neo Deco: Modern Takes on Classic Art Deco Design
item.description: The Neo Deco trend is emerging as one of the key interior design styles for 2026, evolving from the 1920s and 1930s art deco revival. Celebrities such as Zoe Saldaña have showcased this style, highlig...

item.title: How Agroforestry Can Create Jobs and Income for Tanzanian Youth and Women
item.description: In Tanzania and across Africa, job creation for the growing youth population is a big challenge. Millions of young people join the labour market every year, but formal jobs are few and very competitiv...

item.title: Pakistani representatives highlight challenges and progress for women’s rights at UN
item.description: At the 70th session of the Commission on the Status of Women (CSW70) at the United Nations, Pakistan’s delegation made a strong impression by putting women’s access to justice at the centre of the dis...

item.title: 'Sinners' Cast Dazzles at the 2026 Oscars as Record-Breaking Film Awaits Historic Wins
item.description: The cast of Sinners, the critically acclaimed and record-breaking film directed by Ryan Coogler, turned heads at the 98th Academy Awards with their elegant red carpet appearances. The film, set in the...

item.title: Udinese Coach Praises Maduka Okoye's Performance Despite 1-0 Defeat to Juventus
item.description: Nigerian international goalkeeper Maduka Okoye receive plenty praise from im head coach Kosta Runjaic even after Udinese suffer 1-0 defeat to Juventus for Bluenergy Stadium for Serie A match wey happe...

item.title: Chiefs edge Durban City 1-0 to halt losing streak
item.description: Kaizer Chiefs managed to halt a potential four-match losing streak by narrowly beating Durban City 1-0 on a chilly Sunday afternoon. The lone goal came from Glody Lilepo, who struck brilliantly after ...
